tweets.text: Got done with my first draft of my What's In Your Bag infographic- http://www.flickr.com/photos/pseudoplacebo/2070736882/
I love it when Uncyclopedia results come up while I'm doing my homework. http://tinyurl.com/34o9o5
Made myself a mojito- doing my Social Studies home work (english essay later), and thinking of how I can make an infographic with my stats.
Read the New York Times about evolution and art. Got me out of my malaise, temporarily. Hillary Clinton on NPR changed my idea of her.
Took a delightful little nap, and I'll do some homework in a bit. Getting really tired of doing the same thing every day. Yuck.
Majority of my peers currently attending college to get a piece of paper they think entitles them to a job. Very few learning skills.
Nothing is going my way these past two days. I am filled with frustration.
@joshsternberg Ah yes, the extremely popular Tom Steyer, convincing everyone with all those digital ads
I grow weary
RT @333333333433333: it rubs me the wrong way, the ritual mass killing of the pine trees
